findings.description: The source h2 section 'データモデル' contains >= 2000 characters of content and has four h3 subsections (プロトコルヘッダー, 共通プロトコルヘッダー, メッセージボディ, フレームワーク制御ヘッダー), but the knowledge file maps all of this to a single section s4 without splitting. Per V3 rule, large h2 sections with h3 children should be split into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under データモデル: プロトコルヘッダー, 共通プロトコルヘッダー (with 5-row table), メッセージボディ, フレームワーク制御ヘッダー (with 4-row table, field mapping table, and code block). Combined plain-text content well exceeds 2000 characters.
